title: Section 85
content: Minutes, in which shall be recorded the names of the 1[members and other persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] present at, and the proceedings of each meeting 2*** of 3[49560the Corporation]] and of the Standing Committee and every other committee of 3[49560the Corporation]], shall be drawn up and recorded in a book to be kept for that purpose, and shall be laid before the next ensuing meeting of 3[49560the Corporation]] or of such committee, as the case may be, and signed at such meeting by the presiding officer thereof.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 63, for "members present" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. The words "of the councillors for the election of any alderman and of each" omitted by s. 63, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 3.Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 "the Corporation" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 4. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for "a Corporation" (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
